form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr9) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-3.56 beaten 5.5 m by Miki Cohen (1:52.90) in NR up to 75 on April 7 at $23. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 8th-15.4 beaten 10 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $5.50. Draws the pegs and could be ready to show more.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 4 m finishing fourth behind Dance With Carmer at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 85 on March 21 at $26. Then a handy effort when a close third behind Double Fear at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 75 on March 24 at $3.90. Racing well and from a low draw he is one of the main contenders.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, beaten 14 m by Hes A Meister (1:52.20) in NR up to 90 on February 14 at $151. form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 2 m fifth behind Miki Cohen at this track over 1609m NR up to 75 last start. Before that was beaten 1.4 metres fourth again at this track same class on March 24. Go well.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth after being driven well back, behind Heeza Malteeza at this track over 2300m in a NR up to 80 on March 27 at $6.50. Performed better the start before where he won by a head when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (1:53.90) beating Double Fear in NR 71 to 75 on March 17 at $3.80 at the bell was 3rd-4.8. Strong claims.

form.formComment: Hard to fault of late. Last start a big 3 m win after showing early speed, (Fr6) at Newcastle (1:52.70) beating Laceys Lad in NR up to 90 on March 28 at $6.50 at the bell was leading 4.3. Draws wide but with even luck he can be in the finish again.
